problem id: 68213a4c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHL(7)

examples:
  00000001 -> 00000000
  01000101 -> 00000000
  01101101 -> 10000000
  11111011 -> 10000000
  00101000 -> 00000000
  00001101 -> 10000000
  01101000 -> 00000000
  01000011 -> 00000000
  01111110 -> 00000000
  00100111 -> 00000000

query: 01001000
predicted answer: 00000000
